meaning: n.雅美族人,耶美人,雅美语,耶美语
examples: Can you say your name in Yami?
Do you know how to say it in Yami?
We are the Yami people of Orchid Island.
The commission then reached out to the girl's family, offering legal help, Al-Yami said.
The commission sent an investigator to the courthouse in Al-Hurath, Al-Yami said.
